Title: User logs in successfully
Preconditions: User account exists and is active
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the login page.
2. User enters the valid username and password.
3. User clicks the login button.
Expected Result:
- System displays a success message.
- User is redirected to the home page.

Title: User logs in with invalid credentials
Preconditions: User account exists but with incorrect credentials
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the login page.
2. User enters the invalid username and password.
3. User clicks the login button.
Expected Result:
- System displays an error message indicating invalid credentials.
- User remains on the login page.

Title: User logs out successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps: 1. User clicks the logout button.
Expected Result:
- System displays a logout confirmation message.
- User is redirected to the login page.

Title: Admin logs in successfully
Preconditions: Admin account exists and is active
Test Steps:
1. Admin navigates to the admin login page.
2. Admin enters the valid username and password.
3. Admin clicks the login button.
Expected Result:
- System displays a success message.
- Admin is redirected to the admin dashboard.

Title: Admin logs in with invalid credentials
Preconditions: Admin account exists but with incorrect credentials
Test Steps:
1. Admin navigates to the admin login page.
2. Admin enters the invalid username and password.
3. Admin clicks the login button.
Expected Result:
- System displays an error message indicating invalid credentials.
- Admin remains on the login page.

Title: User adds a product to the cart
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Data:
- Product name: "Product A"
- Product description: "Description A"
Test Steps:
1. User selects a product to add to the cart.
2. User clicks the "Add to Cart" button.
Expected Result:
- Product is added to the user's cart.
- Confirmation message is displayed.

Title: User removes a product from the cart
Preconditions: User has at least one product in the cart
Test Steps:
1. User selects a product to remove from the cart.
2. User clicks the "Remove from Cart" button.
Expected Result:
- Product is removed from the user's cart.
- Confirmation message is displayed.

Title: User places an order
Preconditions: User has items in the cart
Test Steps:
1. User reviews the items in the cart.
2. User clicks the "Place Order" button.
Expected Result:
- Order is placed successfully.
- Confirmation message is displayed.

Title: User cancels the order before placing
Preconditions: User has items in the cart
Test Steps:
1. User reviews the items in the cart.
2. User clicks the "Cancel Order" button.
Expected Result:
- Order cancellation is confirmed.
- User is redirected to the cart page.

Title: User places an order with a valid total amount
Preconditions: User has items in the cart with a valid total amount
Test Steps:
1. User confirms the total amount.
2. User clicks the "Place Order" button.
Expected Result:
- Order is placed successfully.
- Confirmation message is displayed.

Title: User attempts to place an order with an invalid total amount
Preconditions: User has items in the cart with an invalid total amount
Test Steps:
1. User confirms the total amount.
2. User clicks the "Place Order" button.
Expected Result:
- System displays an error message indicating an invalid total amount.
- User remains on the checkout page.

Title: User logs in to WeatherService successfully

Test Steps:

2. User enters the valid username and password.
3. User clicks the login button.
Expected Result:

- User is redirected to the weather information page.

Title: User logs in to WeatherService with invalid credentials
Preconditions: User account exists but with incorrect credentials
Test Steps:

Title: User clicks on "Trekking" button
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps: 1. User clicks on the "Trekking" button.
Expected Result:
- Server processes the request.
- Server interacts with the database.
- Confirmation message is displayed.

Title: User clicks on "Trekking" button with server failure
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps: 1. User clicks on the "Trekking" button.
Expected Result:
- Server fails to process the request.
- Error message is displayed.

Title: User logs in to Server successfully
Preconditions: User account exists and is active
Test Steps:
1. User sends a login request to the server.
2. Server handles the login request.
3. Server sends a login result to the user.
Expected Result:
- User receives a login success message.
- User is authenticated.

Title: User logs in to Server with invalid credentials
Preconditions: User account exists but with incorrect credentials
Test Steps:
1. User sends a login request to the server.
2. Server handles the login request.
3. Server sends an error message to the user.
Expected Result:
- User receives an error message indicating invalid credentials.
- User is not authenticated.

Title: User queries the database successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. User sends a query to the database.
2. Database processes the query.
3. Database returns the results to the user.
Expected Result:
- User receives the query results.
- Results are displayed.

Title: User queries the database with invalid query
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. User sends an invalid query to the database.
2. Database processes the query.
3. Database returns an error message to the user.
Expected Result:
- User receives an error message indicating an invalid query.
- No results are displayed.
